• Show All Code
  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

cGAS-STING Pathway Map Notebook (v2)

1) Set Parameters

Edit these values if needed, then click Run All (or Knit).

# Input DESeq2 CSV (Ensembl IDs in first column/ensembl_id).
input_file <- "DESeq2_GRCg7b_Sacral_vs_Free_by_ENS.csv"

# Output directory for map + tables.
output_dir <- "cgast_sting_out"

# Plot title.
plot_title <- "Sacral vs Free (cGAS-STING map)"

2) Load Script

3) Run Pathway Map

$svg
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_map_SVG.svg"

$png
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_map_PNG.png"

$nodes
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_nodes.tsv"

$missing
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_missing_genes.tsv"

$all_results
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_all_results.csv"

$metadata
[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_run_metadata.yml"

4) Preview Outputs

This uses the current script settings (white background, black arrows, text-fitted boxes, capped arrows, and updated significance legend).

5) Export Results CSV (Notebook)

This writes a notebook-generated CSV copy of the full annotated results table.

[1] "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_results_from_notebook.csv"

6) Output Files

                                                    svg                                                     png 
              "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_map_SVG.svg"               "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_map_PNG.png" 
                                                  nodes                                                 missing 
                "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_nodes.tsv"         "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_missing_genes.tsv" 
                                            all_results                                                metadata 
          "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_all_results.csv"          "cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_run_metadata.yml" 
                                   notebook_results_csv 
"cgast_sting_out/cgast_sting_results_from_notebook.csv"

7) Session Info

session_info_file <- file.path(output_dir, "sessionInfo.txt")
session_text <- capture.output(sessionInfo())
writeLines(session_text, session_info_file, useBytes = TRUE)
cat(paste(session_text, collapse = "\n"))

cat("\n\nSaved session info to: ", session_info_file, "\n", sep = "")


Saved session info to: cgast_sting_out/sessionInfo.txt

8) Optional: Additional Pathway Maps

Set eval=TRUE in the chunk header below if you want to render apoptosis, necroptosis, and combined death-module maps in addition to cGAS/STING.

extra <- run_pathway_maps(
  input = input_file,
  outdir = output_dir,
  title = plot_title,
  pathways = c("apoptosis", "necroptosis"),
  include_combined = TRUE
)

extra
